paths.name: @/backend/database/*
paths.message: App router code must not import backend database modules directly.

paths.name: @/backend/services/*
paths.message: App router code must not import backend services directly.

paths.name: @/backend/repositories/*

paths.name: mssql
paths.message: App router code must not talk to the database driver directly.
